data.title: Astrid Prado from Star Refrigeration is shortlisted for the Top 100 Most Influential Women in Construction Awards 2025.
data.description: In London on July 17, 2025, Star Refrigeration revealed that Astrid Prado, the Head of Marketing, has been selected as a finalist for the esteemed Top 100 Most Influential Women in Construction Awards 2025, organized by the Construction Industry Training Board (CITB). This recognition highlights Prado's exceptional contributions to the industry and positions her among top professionals.

data.title: Outboard Engines Market valued at USD 9.3B in 2025, projected to reach USD 14.8B by 2034, with CAGR of 5.3%.
data.description: In Dublin, a recent report on the Outboard Engines Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market is currently valued at USD 9.3 billion in 2025, with projections indicating a growth at a CAGR of 5.3%. By the year 2034, global sales in this market are expected to reach USD 14.8 billion. The Outboard Engines Market is segmented by Type (Fuel-Oil Outboard, Electric Outboard), Engine Type (2-Stroke, 4-Stroke, Electric), and Application. This sector is witnessing steady growth.

data.title: Inszone Insurance Services expands in Midwest by acquiring Snell-Nelson Insurance Agency. Established in 1985, firm operates in Kansas and Oklahoma.
data.description: Inszone Insurance Services, a prominent national insurance provider offering commercial, personal, and benefits insurance, has successfully acquired Snell-Nelson Insurance Agency, Inc., an esteemed insurance agency headquartered in Ashland, Kansas, and operating across various locations in Kansas and Oklahoma. Founded in 1985 by Monica Meininger, Snell-Nelson Insurance Agency is well-regarded for its outstanding client service, specializing in farm insurance. This acquisition marks a significant milestone in Inszone's expansion strategy and commitment to enhancing its presence in the region.

data.title: Congress is discussing 3 bills to regulate the crypto industry. 1 bill is close to becoming law.
data.description: This week, the House addressed three bills aiming to create a national system for overseeing the cryptocurrency sector. Among them, one bill is on track to pass Congress and be implemented as law.

data.title: Morgan Stanley's Q2 2025 earnings $2.13 (up from $1.82) beats consensus, revenue $16.79B (up 12%), stock reacts negatively.
data.description: Morgan Stanley reported second-quarter 2025 earnings of $2.13 per share, up from $1.82 a year prior, exceeding the expected $2.02. Net earnings rose to $3.54 billion from $3.08 billion. The bank's revenue for the quarter was $16.79 billion, a 12% increase from the previous year and surpassing the consensus of $16.11 billion. Despite these positive results, the stock experienced a negative reaction post-earnings release. The provision for credit losses increased to $196 million, driven by growth in the corporate loan portfolio and secured lending facilities, as well as a weaker macroeconomic outlook. Morgan Stanley's markets and wealth management divisions performed well, but its investment banking lagged compared to JPMorgan. JPMorgan reported a strong Q2, which further impacted Morgan Stanley's stock performance.

data.title: JCP&L is upgrading power grid in central NJ to boost reliability for thousands. Helicopter to set new equipment. Jul 17, 2025.
data.description: In preparation for infrastructure upgrades to enhance the regional power grid in central New Jersey, Jersey Central Power & Light (JCP&L) announced that a helicopter will be employed in the fall to install new equipment and string power lines. This initiative, set to take place in November 2025, aims to bolster the power system's resilience and capacity. The project, expected to cover a significant area, is part of a strategic effort by JCP&L to modernize the energy infrastructure and ensure reliable electricity supply to approximately 1.1 million customers in the region.

data.title: E Source appoints Norv Clontz to lead data strategy and innovation practice. Company focuses on innovative offers.
data.description: A former utility executive has recently been appointed to spearhead the creation of groundbreaking packages that merge the company's data science and consulting expertise. The organization named E Source, operating in the utilities sector, based in Boulder, Colorado. The announcement was made on July 17, 2025, via PRNewswire.

data.title: Ethereum and XRP at all-time highs on Myriad; Pump.fun (PUMP) airdrop upcoming. Trending markets.
data.description: This week on Myriad, notable market activity includes Ethereum and XRP reaching record price highs, alongside an airdrop of the Pump.fun (PUMP) token. The surge in Ethereum and XRP is drawing attention, with Ethereum hitting a new record of $3,500 while XRP also saw significant gains. Additionally, the Pump.fun (PUMP) token airdrop has attracted interest in the market.

data.title: Stonepeak plans to invest $1.3 billion in Princeton Digital Group, which has raised $2.5 billion this year for growth.
data.description: PDG, the prominent data center operator in Asia Pacific, has successfully raised USD 2.5 billion this year. In a significant move, the company has revealed plans to expedite its growth through a combination of organic expansion and mergers and acquisitions. The announcement was made on July 17, 2025, in Singapore. This strategic decision positions PDG to enhance its scale and operations within the region, solidifying its position as a key player in the data center industry.

data.title: L3Harris introduces Launched Effects Vehicles to bolster US multi-domain power with Red WolfTM & Green WolfTM, for DoD's needs.
data.description: In Washington, L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) has unveiled a set of launched effects vehicles, showcasing their capability to meet the U.S. Department of Defense's pressing demand for sophisticated, effective, and cost-efficient munitions for use in various services and environments. The Red WolfTM and Green WolfTM mark the initial entries in L3Harris' growing collection of versatile vehicles that can be seamlessly integrated and deployed from air, land, or sea-based systems. The Red Wolf model functions as a kinetic platform, offering cutting-edge functionalities to defense operations.

data.title: HiddenLayer appoints Chelsea Strong as Chief Revenue Officer to drive global growth. Strong has 25 years experience in enterprise sales.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on July 17, 2025, HiddenLayer, a top security solutions company for artificial intelligence, revealed Chelsea Strong as their new Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). Strong brings more than 25 years of expertise in boosting enterprise sales and business development to the role.

data.title: Blue Vault's 2025 Mid-Year Outlook provides alternative investment insights from 20+ firms, guiding on trends and sectors.
data.description: In Cumming, Georgia, Blue Vault has published its 2025 Mid-Year Outlook which includes insights on alternative investments from over 20 firms. This report aims to assist advisors by providing guidance on current trends, sectors to watch, and recommended allocations in the market.

data.title: Rutgers swimmer Brooke Thompson named SHI brand ambassador, holds USA Deaf Swimming Record in 50m freestyle (23.53).
data.description: In Somerset, New Jersey, SHI International, a prominent IT solutions provider, has appointed Rutgers University swimmer Brooke Thompson as its latest brand ambassador. Thompson, a rising junior at Rutgers University, will be representing the SHI brand as she gears up for the 2025 Deaflympics in Tokyo this November. She currently holds the USA Deaf Swimming Record in the 50-meter freestyle with a time of 23.53, a record she achieved at the 2025 Big Ten Championships. Thompson's outstanding achievements make her a valuable addition to SHI International's team.
